name: Pineapple Smoothie
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pineapple and reserve half a cup of juice.
2. Freeze the pineapple chunks.
3. Combine the reserved juice, buttermilk, vanilla, sweetener, and frozen pineapple in a blender container.
4. Blend until smooth.
5. Pour into glasses and garnish with mint if desired.
DIABETIC EXCHANGES: One serving = 1/2 skim milk, 1/2 fruit; also, 74 calories, 52 mg sodium, 2mg cholesterol, 16gm carbohydrate, 2 gm protein and 1gm fat.
